meta.notes: MiniMax generated an 18.3s track for a 67.8s video (short-track case). Skill looped it automatically. music_generation_minimax timing extracted from skill log (81.7s). beat_alignment_encode+audio_mix estimated as beat_sync_full minus music_generation (39.4s).

task.name: music-beat-sync
task.purpose: Add hype beat-synced background music to a 67.8s vlog using MiniMax API, sync 26 scene cuts to beats
task.expected_output: Video with hype beat-synced background music, scene cuts aligned to beats

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/music-beat-sync/

asset_acquisition.notes: curl from S3 us-east-1 to devbox

steps.name: scene_detection
steps.notes: ffmpeg select filter standalone; 26 scene cuts at threshold 0.35

steps.name: music_generation_minimax
steps.notes: From skill log: 'Music generated in 81.7s (track: 18.3s)'. Short track — looped by skill to fill 67.8s video. Prompt: 120 BPM trap hip-hop hype.

steps.name: beat_alignment_encode
steps.notes: Estimated: beat_sync_full (121.115) minus music_generation (81.7). Includes S3 beat analysis, S4 sync-mode cut alignment (26 cuts speed-adjusted), ffmpeg encode.

steps.name: audio_mix
steps.notes: Included within beat_alignment_encode; S5 audio mix (replace mode) not separately timed

steps.name: beat_sync_full
steps.notes: Full beat_sync.py --vibe hype --dev run. Output: /tmp/beat-sync/beat_sync_output.mp4 (16.1 MB)

delivery.notes: No upload — local delivery only (Claude Code benchmark)

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-cc-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. Token data included other tasks from the same Claude Code session.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
